content.body:
Wires the Transponder emitter into runInitWithConfig — emits one
SessionEvent (trigger: normal) and one RuntimeHealth after a successful
init, giving an end-to-end smoke path to verify the emitter works on disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(init): emit SessionEvent + RuntimeHealth via transponder on leo init
